case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ETTY KAROLINA SIERRA SANTOS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IRENE GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT ETTY KARONLINA SIERRA SANTOS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0 SERVED APR-21-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, ETTY KAROLINA SIERRA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $672.48 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, ETTY KAROLINA SIERRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED APR-21-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, ETTY KAROLINA SIERRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS, ETTY KAROLINA SIERRA $372.48 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $477.48 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-30-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
